Software Engineer Portfolio

Michael Stevan Lapandio

I build reliable products across backend and frontend stacks, with a strong focus on clean architecture and practical impact.

Software Engineer Yogyakarta, Indonesia michaellapandio04@gmail.com
  • boot::init profile "Michael Stevan Lapandio"
  • load::modules [about, resume, projects, contact]
  • status::online location="Yogyakarta, Indonesia"
  • prompt::ready

menu::navigate

  • $ open about Profile summary, birthday, and skills
  • $ open resume Experience timeline and education
  • $ open projects Selected work and technology stack
  • $ open contact Email and social profiles
